letter:
Dear [Homeowner Name],

I hope this letter finds you well! As someone deeply passionate about the unique charm and history of Old Las Palmas, I couldn't resist reaching out to express my admiration for your incredible home at 515 West Via Lola. Kirk Douglas' connection to this property has made it an integral part of Palm Springs' rich Hollywood legacy.

As a local real estate professional specializing in this neighborhood, I recently had the privilege of representing the sale of 550 N Cahuilla, which sold for nearly asking price in just 20 days—remarkable compared to the usual 90-day timeline. Additionally, I’m working with several off-market properties, including Gene Autry’s former estate, which has been beautifully restored and is available at $4.2 million.

Your home holds such a special place in this community, and I would be honored to meet you to hear more about its story. Whether over coffee at Ernest Coffee or through a private tour, I’d love to learn more about what makes your property truly exceptional.

Feel free to scan the QR code below or visit [www.dsteamps.com](https://www.dsteamps.com) to connect with me.

Warm regards,  
Daniel Stuart  
Coldwell Banker Realty

history: Recent luxury sale at 550 N Cahuilla
letter:
Dear [Homeowner Name],

Congratulations on your recent purchase of 550 N Cahuilla! Your beautiful new home perfectly embodies the luxurious and timeless appeal of Old Las Palmas. It’s always a pleasure to see properties of this caliber find owners who will appreciate their unique character.

As a local expert in Palm Springs real estate, I’ve seen firsthand how special this neighborhood is. Your home joins an exclusive list of historically significant properties, including Kirk Douglas’ former residence and Gene Autry’s restored estate, which is currently available off-market at $4.2 million.

If you’d ever like to share the story behind your decision to make this your home—or even show off its wonderful features—I’d love to connect. We could meet at Ernest Coffee or schedule a quick chat to get to know each other.

Please feel free to use the QR code below to reach me, or visit [www.dsteamps.com](https://www.dsteamps.com).

Warm regards,  
Daniel Stuart  
Coldwell Banker Realty
